Bash(python3 - << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFilter
import math

SIZE = 1024
img = Image.new\("RGBA", \(SIZE, SIZE\), \(0, 0, 0, 0\)\)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(img\)

# Background: radial gradient from Deep \(#0D1220\) to Night \(#0A0D1A\)
bg = Image.new\("RGBA", \(SIZE, SIZE\)\)
bg_draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(bg\)
for i in range\(SIZE // 2, -1, -1\):
    t = i / \(SIZE / 2\)
    r = int\(0x0D * t + 0x0A * \(1 - t\)\)
    g = int\(0x12 * t + 0x0D * \(1 - t\)\)
    b = int\(0x20 * t + 0x1A * \(1 - t\)\)
    bg_draw.ellipse\([SIZE//2 - i, SIZE//2 - i, SIZE//2 + i, SIZE//2 + i], fill=\(r, g, b, 255\)\)

img.paste\(bg\)

# Crescent moon — two-circle method, centered at \(512, 512\)
# Outer circle: center \(440, 512\), r=310  → spans y 202–822
# Inner  circle: center \(610, 512\), r=355 → inner edge at x=255 from center
# Crescent = outer ∩ ¬inner

OUTER_CX, OUTER_CY, OUTER_R = 440, 512, 310
INNER_CX, INNER_CY, INNER_R = 610, 512, 355

MOON_COLOR = \(0x9B, 0x8F, 0xC4, 255\)

# Draw on a separate layer for clean compositing
moon_layer = Image.new\("RGBA", \(SIZE, SIZE\), \(0, 0, 0, 0\)\)
moon_draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(moon_layer\)

# Draw outer filled circle
moon_draw.ellipse\(
    [OUTER_CX - OUTER_R, OUTER_CY - OUTER_R, OUTER_CX + OUTER_R, OUTER_CY + OUTER_R],
    fill=MOON_COLOR
\)

# Erase inner circle \(cut out\)
moon_draw.ellipse\(
    [INNER_CX - INNER_R, INNER_CY - INNER_R, INNER_CX + INNER_R, INNER_CY + INNER_R],
    fill=\(0, 0, 0, 0\)
\)

img = Image.alpha_composite\(img.convert\("RGBA"\), moon_layer\)

out = "/Users/ptudor01/AndroidStudioProjects/TapSleep/iosApp/iosApp/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/AppIcon.png"
img.save\(out\)
print\("saved"\)
EOF)
